title: Body Business
editorialSummary: Human body systems grouped by primary function. Transport: circulatory system components and terms — heart, plasma, aorta, capillary. Control and signalling: nervous system terms — neuron, synapse, axon, myelin. Defence and immunity: immune system terms — antibody, macrophage, lymph node, T-cell. Digestion and absorption: digestive system terms — duodenum, peristalsis, villi, bile. False trail: lymph node looks like circulatory (lymph vessels are near blood vessels); myelin looks like it could be a structural term; bile could be confused with liver function rather than digestion.
